subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up after the conference! We'd be happy to schedule a meeting to explore potential partnership opportunities between our teams.

We have the following slots available next week:
- April 21, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- April 22, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- April 23, 14:00–16:00 UTC

Please let us know which of these times works best for a 30-minute call, and we'll send a calendar invite.

Regarding your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering: we're unable to share individual internal contact information directly. All official partnership discussions can be coordinated through this email address, and we'll ensure the appropriate senior team members are included in discussions as we progress. General information about our leadership team is also available on our public website at https://company.internal.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards,
The Team
